transport: plain HTTP/1.1 with browser user agent
summary: HomePerfect remains a bath-showroom gap, not an active Reno Goat source. Product-bearing catalogsearch routes for shower valves and bathroom vanities return Cloudflare managed challenge responses. Static Magento assets under /static/version1 are reachable and show a Magento Luma storefront with Smile ElasticSuite quick search, but the likely autocomplete/search endpoints tested returned 404 and no priced product rows were proven.
product_gap: shower valve and shower control rows with prices
HomePerfect bath-showroom product URLs suitable for active fan-out

routes_tested.result: HTTP 403 Cloudflare managed challenge; Cf-Mitigated: challenge

static_asset_findings: robots.txt is reachable and contains content-signal text but no product routes.
requirejs-config.js maps quickSearch to Smile_ElasticsuiteCore/js/form-mini, confirming Smile ElasticSuite search is present.

Smile_ElasticsuiteCore/js/form-mini.js is reachable and performs GET JSON requests to a page-configured this.options.url with data {q: value}. The static module does not contain the concrete suggest URL.
next_action: Use GHST-293/browser-like transport or a browser resource capture of the challenged catalogsearch page to recover the page-configured Smile ElasticSuite suggest URL and verify whether it returns priced product rows.
